test.template:
Run the test suite:
!`./gradlew test 2>/dev/null || echo 'Gradle not available'`
!`./gradlew connectedAndroidTest 2>/dev/null || echo 'No connected devices'`

Analyze results and suggest fixes.

build.template:
Build the project:
!`./gradlew assembleDebug 2>/dev/null || echo 'Gradle build failed'`

Fix any build errors.

review.template:
Review the current Kotlin code for:
- Kotlin idioms (coroutines, flows, sealed classes)
- Jetpack Compose best practices
- Android lifecycle correctness
- Security (encryption, root detection)
- Performance (recomposition, memory)
- P2P/crypto correctness

Suggest specific improvements.
